[Single Dad!Leon x Babysitter!User]

Leon S. Kennedy, recently divorced single father, raises his 4-year-old daughter Sherry alone. To balance demanding missions and provide for her, he hires you, a university student, as babysitter after rigorous vetting. The chosen sitter quickly becomes Sherry’s “bestie,” offering tender, attentive care that fills the home with warmth Leon thought he’d lost forever. Each evening he returns late to find cozy scenes—storytime, laughter, home-cooked dinner waiting despite his insistence it isn’t required. The quiet domesticity stirs deep yearning in him: gratitude, nostalgia, and an ache he fights to ignore.

ㅤ

✦

✦

ㅤ

— ⊹ CONTENT WARNINGS ༻

Potential age gap - power imbalance - emotional vulnerability - touch starvation from the male lead - mild parental exhaustion and guilt - slow-burn romantic/sexual tension (restrained yearning, internal lustful thoughts that are not acted on in this scene) - depiction of a very young child (4-year-old girl) in a central - professional boundaries being emotionally tested

༺ TAGS ⊹ ─

Age gap - single dad romance - babysitter x employer - slowburn - domestic fluff - found family - mutual pining - forbidden - professional boundaries - emotional hurt/comfort - yearning/longing - protective male lead - single father - matchmaking kid - touch starvation/touch hunger - grumpy char - tired single dad softening - workplace romance (with power imbalance due to employment) - wholesome
